cards.name: Ⅲ The Empress
cards.interpretation: divine feminine, sensuality, fertility, nurturing, creativity, beauty, abundance, nature

cards.name: Ⅴ The Hierophant, reversed

cards.name: ⅩⅡ The Hanged Man
cards.interpretation: sacrifice, waiting, uncertainty, lack of direction, perspective, contemplation
